name: Pigtail CRC9 / SMA Female 15cm
title: Pigtail CRC9 / SMA Female 15cm
short_description: Suitable for Huawei and other 3G/4G LTE modems
description: The Pigtail CRC9 / SMA Female 15cm (P-C9-SF-15) is designed to provide a stable and efficient connection between devices with CRC9 connectors and external antennas or equipment using SMA interfaces. CRC9 connectors are commonly found in LTE/4G/5G USB modems, portable routers, and mobile hotspots, while SMA connectors are widely used in high-performance external antennas for cellular, Wi-Fi, and GPS applications. This pigtail is an excellent solution for boosting wireless signal strength by enabling the use of external antennas with your modem, router, or hotspot. With a compact length of 15 cm, it ensures minimal signal loss while offering flexibility for installation in tight spaces.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The Pigtail CRC9 / SMA Female 15cm (P-C9-SF-15) is designed to provide a stable and efficient connection between devices with CRC9 connectors and external antennas or equipment using SMA interfaces. CRC9 connectors are commonly found in LTE/4G/5G USB modems, portable routers, and mobile hotspots, while SMA connectors are widely used in high-performance external antennas for cellular, Wi-Fi, and GPS applications. This pigtail is an excellent solution for boosting wireless signal strength by enabling the use of external antennas with your modem, router, or hotspot. With a compact length of 15 cm, it ensures minimal signal loss while offering flexibility for installation in tight spaces.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Accessory
detailed_description.text: The P-C9-SF-15 is a versatile accessory that expands the compatibility of your networking and RF equipment. By enabling connections to high-gain or specialized external antennas, it helps enhance both signal reception and transmission for Wi-Fi, LTE, and other RF applications. This improvement in coverage and network stability makes it especially useful for mobile hotspots, LTE/5G modems, portable routers, and custom projects. Its compact design ensures flexibility during installation while minimizing signal loss, providing dependable performance in a variety of scenarios. Whether you need better coverage at home, stronger connectivity for office use, or a reliable solution for professional setups, this pigtail offers a simple and effective way to upgrade your system.
